scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'); const clean=p=>{if(!fs.existsSync(p))return; for(const e of fs.readdirSync(p,{withFileTypes:true})){const f=path.join(p,e.name); if(e.isDirectory()){clean(f); fs.rmdirSync(f);} else fs.unlinkSync(f);}}; clean('dist');"
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy
